brand_voice.summary: The brand communicates with a warm and inviting tone, effectively engaging its audience through playful and appetizing language. The use of colloquial Najdi dialect enhances relatability and connection with local customers.

strategic_gaps: Increase human presence in visuals to enhance relatability.
Leverage more seasonal content around Ramadan and National Day to engage wider audience.
Diversify content formats to include more carousels for storytelling.
ogz_recommendation: Focus on increasing the frequency of video content, as it is the best performing format. Additionally, consider integrating more user-generated content to foster community engagement and build loyalty.
